grant_and_term.initial_term: 20 years from 1st day of month of Hotel opening
grant_and_term.successor_franchise: 10-year term on then-current terms (may be materially different)
grant_and_term.site_restriction: Must operate only from approved site

fee_and_payment_obligations.audit_rights: Hyatt may audit at any time; understatement ≥3% = franchisee pays audit costs
fee_and_payment_obligations.tax_gross_up: Franchisee must pay additional taxes to provide Hyatt with after-tax receipts

site_selection_and_construction.design_construction_standards: Must comply with Hyatt DCS and Hotel System
site_selection_and_construction.comfort_letter_required: From each lender, ground lessor, and parties with interest in Hotel property

training_and_operational_obligations.system_standards_compliance: 3,615 pages of System Standards; continuous monitoring required
training_and_operational_obligations.quality_assurance_program: Inspections at any time with or without notice; free lodging for inspectors

franchisor_with_cause_curable.default: Failure to provide insurance/real estate docs
Failure to pay taxes/develop Hotel/pay Providers
Other defaults not listed as non-curable

franchisor_with_cause_non_curable: Cease Hotel operations or lose possession
Contest ownership of or try to register Hyatt IP
Felony conviction (with Limited Interest Owner carve-out)
Repeated defaults (3+ in 12 months or 2+ same obligation in 6 months)

transfer_restrictions.non_control_transfers_permitted: Without approval if transferee not Competing Brand Owner, not sanctioned, doesn't create Controlling Interest, notice within 30 days
conditions_for_approval: Sign new FA or assume existing (at Hyatt's option)

default_and_cross_default.suspension_of_rights_on_default: CRS/GDS/ADS access, advertising, fee reductions, support

noncompete.during_term: No traditional covenant; franchisee/management company may not be Competing Brand Owner
noncompete.competing_brand_owner_definition: Entity that franchises/owns/manages brand with 5+ hotels, ADR ≥60% of Brand Hotel ADR

guaranty.scope: Personal guarantee of ALL obligations — monetary and non-monetary
guaranty.guarantors: Controlling Ownership Interest owners specified by Hyatt
guaranty.spousal_guarantee: Not explicitly required but Controlling Owner could include spouse
guaranty.monetary_threshold: Net worth and liquidity minimums, increasing annually by CPI

liquidated_damages.formula: Lesser of 36 months or remaining term × 8.5% of Average Monthly Revenue
liquidated_damages.consequential_termination: 150% multiplier (transfer to Competitor or 3+ FA defaults)
liquidated_damages.casualty_termination: With Termination Agreement: no LD, but $5,000/room if new select-service hotel built in AOP within 24 months

venue_and_dispute_resolution.arbitration: Mandatory; within 10 miles of Hyatt's principal business address (Chicago, IL)
venue_and_dispute_resolution.governing_law: Illinois (subject to FAA and state law)

insurance.required: Amounts per System Standards; Hyatt may obtain and charge if franchisee fails

indemnification.scope: Franchisee indemnifies Hyatt and related parties for all claims arising from application, development, operation, breach, and Hotel's proportionate share of multi-hotel actions

distinctive_clauses.guest_information_ownership: Hyatt owns all Guest Information during term; unlimited access to PMS data
distinctive_clauses.innovations_assignment: All inventions/innovations relating to Brand Hotels are Hyatt's property (work-for-hire or assignment)
distinctive_clauses.competing_brand_owner_restriction: During term only; no post-term restriction
distinctive_clauses.aop_term_limited: Typically 3 years — extraordinarily short for 20-year franchise
